strengths: Expert-level TypeScript and Node.js proficiency with proven software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, pairing) across multiple senior roles
Demonstrated full-stack capabilities: React frontend, Node.js backend, database design, and DevOps infrastructure experience
Strong learning agility across diverse tech stacks and domains; active teaching and mentoring background
concerns: Severe overqualification: Staff-level engineer with 15+ years experience applying for entry-level junior IC role targeting 'first to several years' professionals—creates near-certain retention and satisfaction risk
Location barrier: Currently based in Lagos, Nigeria; role requires high on-site presence with no relocation signal provided
Domain misalignment: Recent staff-level work in AI infrastructure and pricing automation; zero exposure to renewable energy, construction, or building-renovation workflows

key_factors.factor: Domain mismatch (AI/pricing background, no energy/construction exposure)

response.justification: Bogdan is a Staff-level engineer with 15+ years of cumulative experience, fundamentally misaligned with an entry-level junior position explicitly designed for 'first to several years' professionals. Entry roles provide growth through progressive responsibility; a staff engineer would experience reduced scope and authority, creating predictable retention risk and role dissatisfaction within months. His Lagos location directly conflicts with the stated high on-site requirement. While his TypeScript and React foundation align, his recent work in AI infrastructure and pricing systems offers no renewable energy or construction domain exposure. The combination of seniority inversion, location barrier, and domain disconnect makes this a weak fit despite strong technical capabilities.
